description_long: This object is a professional DJ setup consisting of two Pioneer DJ turntables and a central audio mixer. The turntables feature large jog wheels, multiple colored buttons, and digital display screens for track information and controls. The central mixer is equipped with numerous sliders, knobs, and buttons for audio mixing and effects, as well as input/output ports visible on the rear. The setup is interconnected with visible audio and power cables, and the entire assembly rests on four sturdy feet. The exterior is primarily black with metallic and colored accents, giving it a sleek, modern appearance. This type of equipment is commonly used for live music performances, DJ events, or in nightclubs and urban entertainment venues.
description: A professional Pioneer DJ setup with two turntables and a central mixer, featuring digital displays, jog wheels, and numerous control buttons and sliders. The assembly is sleek, black, and interconnected with visible cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing both turntables, the central mixer, and the main control surfaces with jog wheels and colored buttons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, the arrangement of the turntables and mixer, and the visible feet supporting the setup.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the input/output ports, power and audio cables, and the back panels of the turntables and mixer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the mixer and turntables from the other side, with visible control surfaces and cable connections.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, rotary dials, sliders, jog wheels
